raw_outputs.groq:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a must be a sequence",
    "b must be a sequence"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "output is a sequence",
    "output is the concatenation of a and b"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "a is an empty sequence",
    "b is an empty sequence",
    "a and b are of different sequence types",
    "a or b contains non-hashable elements"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.groq2:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a and b must be sequences",
    "all items in a and b must be plain strings",
    "a and b must not be None"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "the result is a sequence",
    "all items in the result are plain strings",
    "the result is the concatenation of a and b"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "if a is an empty sequence, the result is b",
    "if b is an empty sequence, the result is a",
    "if a and b are both empty sequences, the result is an empty sequence"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.hf:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a and b must be sequences",
    "all items in a and b must be plain strings",
    "a and b must not be None"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "the result is a sequence of strings",
    "the result is the concatenation of a and b"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "if a is an empty sequence, the result is b",
    "if b is an empty sequence, the result is a",
    "if both a and b are empty sequences, the result is an empty sequence"
  ]
}
```
